nasb.text: Your teeth are like a flock of ewes Which have come up from their washing, All of which bear twins, And not one among them has lost her young.

esv.text: Your teeth are like a flock of ewes that have come up from the washing; all of them bear twins; not one among them has lost its young.

cnv.text: 你的牙齒像一群母羊， 剛剛洗淨上來那樣潔白整齊； 牠們成雙成對， 沒有單獨一隻的。

ccb.text: 你的牙齿白得像一群洗干净的母羊， 成双成对， 一颗也没有脱落。
